label: crm.lead

duration_tracking.name: duration_tracking
duration_tracking.help_text: JSON that maps ids from a many2one field to seconds spent

campaign_id.name: campaign_id
campaign_id.help_text: This is a name that helps you keep track of your different campaign efforts, e.g. Fall_Drive, Christmas_Special

source_id.name: source_id
source_id.help_text: This is the source of the link, e.g. Search Engine, another domain, or name of email list

medium_id.name: medium_id
medium_id.help_text: This is the method of delivery, e.g. Postcard, Email, or Banner Ad

activity_state.name: activity_state
activity_state.help_text:
Status based on activities
Overdue: Due date is already passed
Today: Activity date is today
Planned: Future activities.

activity_exception_decoration.name: activity_exception_decoration
activity_exception_decoration.help_text: Type of the exception activity on record.

activity_exception_icon.name: activity_exception_icon
activity_exception_icon.help_text: Icon to indicate an exception activity.

message_needaction.name: message_needaction
message_needaction.help_text: If checked, new messages require your attention.

message_has_error.name: message_has_error
message_has_error.help_text: If checked, some messages have a delivery error.

message_has_error_counter.name: message_has_error_counter
message_has_error_counter.help_text: Number of messages with delivery error

message_has_sms_error.name: message_has_sms_error
message_has_sms_error.help_text: If checked, some messages have a delivery error.

phone_sanitized.name: phone_sanitized
phone_sanitized.help_text: Field used to store sanitized phone number. Helps speeding up searches and comparisons.

phone_sanitized_blacklisted.name: phone_sanitized_blacklisted
phone_sanitized_blacklisted.help_text: If the sanitized phone number is on the blacklist, the contact won't receive mass mailing sms anymore, from any list

phone_blacklisted.name: phone_blacklisted
phone_blacklisted.help_text: Indicates if a blacklisted sanitized phone number is a phone number. Helps distinguish which number is blacklisted             when there is both a mobile and phone field in a model.

mobile_blacklisted.name: mobile_blacklisted
mobile_blacklisted.help_text: Indicates if a blacklisted sanitized phone number is a mobile number. Helps distinguish which number is blacklisted             when there is both a mobile and phone field in a model.

email_normalized.name: email_normalized
email_normalized.help_text: This field is used to search on email address as the primary email field can contain more than strictly an email address.

is_blacklisted.name: is_blacklisted
is_blacklisted.help_text: If the email address is on the blacklist, the contact won't receive mass mailing anymore, from any list

message_bounce.name: message_bounce
message_bounce.help_text: Counter of the number of bounced emails for this contact

user_company_ids.name: user_company_ids
user_company_ids.help_text: UX: Limit to lead company or all if no company

tag_ids.name: tag_ids
tag_ids.help_text: Classify and analyze your lead/opportunity categories like: Training, Service

date_deadline.name: date_deadline
date_deadline.help_text: Estimate of the date on which the opportunity will be won.

partner_id.name: partner_id
partner_id.help_text: Linked partner (optional). Usually created when converting the lead. You can find a partner by its Name, TIN, Email or Internal Reference.

partner_is_blacklisted.name: partner_is_blacklisted
partner_is_blacklisted.help_text: If the email address is on the blacklist, the contact won't receive mass mailing anymore, from any list

partner_name.name: partner_name
partner_name.help_text: The name of the future partner company that will be created while converting the lead into opportunity

lang_code.name: lang_code
lang_code.help_text: This field is used to set/get locales for user

iap_enrich_done.name: iap_enrich_done
iap_enrich_done.help_text: Whether IAP service for lead enrichment based on email has been performed on this lead.

workflow_hints:
All required fields must be filled. Use preview action to check what's missing.
partner_id is required — always confirm the customer/vendor before creating.
